instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) with SysML [17] for system modeling across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer). Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) such as ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25], [26], and SysML IBDs [17], [27] are employed for component-based descriptions, including interfaces and interconnections. Behavior modeling is handled via MontiArc Automaton and SysML state machines, enhanced by tools like MathWorks Simulink [28], simulation methods [29], [30], and general-purpose languages (C++, Java). Methodologies including RFLP [18], [19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] manage complexity."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security measures include X.509 certificate-based authentication and role-based access control (RBAC) for Asset Administration Shell (AAS) components per Plattform Industrie 4.0 standards, TLS encryption for MQTT communication using Mosquitto server, JWT token authentication and RBAC in Thingsboard IoT platform, and RAMI4.0 security dimension integration for cross-layer cybersecurity protocols."
]
